title: Claude Fable 5 + YouTube = $30,000/mo
summary: A YouTube automation system combining Claude Code Fable 5, Higsfield CLI, and Auphonic to create and edit video content at low cost. The pipeline involves reverse-engineering successful channels, writing scripts, recording voice-overs, and using Claude to automatically edit videos together into finished YouTube content.
writeup: The video lays out a faceless YouTube automation pipeline built around Claude Code Fable 5, the Higsfield CLI, and Auphonic, framed as a low-cost path to monthly revenue. The workflow reverse-engineers successful channels, generates scripts, records voice-overs, and routes the assembly through Claude to edit clips into finished videos. The takeaway is an end-to-end production system that leans on code generation, video generation, and voice cloning to cut manual editing.
